title: iberis odorata
intro: Iberis odorata, also known as sweet candytuft, is a perennial plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Iberis odorata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a tea or used in herbal infusions, and its essential oil is also extracted for use in aromatherapy and skincare products.
